functions: app.current_tenant_id() RETURNS uuid — reads JWT claim or app_metadata.tenant_id
helpers.verdict: OK — STABLE SQL, planner-inlinable, NULL-safe via NULLIF + COALESCE

using_true_findings.impact: Any authenticated user reads every payment row across all tenants. Conflicts with R13 payments_cajero_select / payments_owner_all which are tenant-scoped — this permissive policy OR-overrides them.
using_true_findings.fix: R16_RLS_HARDENING.sql replaces with payments_admin_read + payments_owner_read + payments_cajero_read, all tenant-scoped

using_true_findings.impact: Cashier in tenant A reads error rows tagged tenant_id=B (PII in meta JSONB, business intel)
using_true_findings.fix: R16_RLS_HARDENING.sql restricts to is_admin() OR (is_owner() AND tenant_id = current_tenant_id()::text)

using_true_findings.impact: Reference data, intentionally global (no tenant_id column). No leak.

using_true_findings.definition: FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true)
using_true_findings.impact: service_role bypasses RLS at the engine level — clause is decorative.

actions: DROP payments_read_authenticated; create 3 tenant-scoped read policies (admin/owner/cajero)
Rewrite error_log_admin_read to is_admin() OR same-tenant owner; cashier default-deny
Sanity-check helpers exist + final assertion that no USING(true) policies remain on the patched tables
